data.upgrade1: Adds 1 additional projectile. Reduces fire rate by 30%, slightly increases spread.
data.upgrade3: Increases: range by 75%, projectile speed by 3 times.
data.upgrade4: Chance to create a drone at the destroyed projectile's location. Chance depends on luck.
data.upgrade5: Makes most of the character's attacks explosive.
data.upgrade6: Projectiles gradually grow in flight, does not affect damage.
data.upgrade7: Projectiles home in, increases range by 30%.
data.upgrade8: Chance to create a mine at the destroyed projectile's location. Chance depends on luck.
data.upgrade9: When destroyed, the projectile creates an unlimited range beam perpendicular to itself.
data.upgrade10: Doubles the size and hitbox of projectiles.
data.upgrade11: Increases: fire rate by 30%, projectile speed by 2 times.
data.upgrade12: Projectiles constantly fire mini-projectiles in random directions.
data.upgrade13: Chance to fire an incendiary projectile. Deals gradual damage to creatures. Chance depends on luck.
data.upgrade14: Chance to fire a poison projectile. Reduces damage dealt by creatures. Chance depends on luck.
data.upgrade15: Chance to fire a freezing projectile. Slows down creatures. Chance depends on luck.
data.upgrade16: Chance to fire a stunning projectile. Briefly completely immobilizes creatures. Chance depends on luck.
data.upgrade17: Chance to fire a blinding projectile. Briefly disorients creatures. Chance depends on luck.
data.upgrade20: Completely removes weapon spread and prevents it from increasing.
data.upgrade21: Increases run speed by 50%. Reduces maximum stamina by 2 units. While running, the character creates freezing piercing attacks to the sides.
data.upgrade22: Completely removes recoil and prevents it from increasing. The character deals contact damage to creatures while moving.
data.upgrade23: Increases character's walk and run speed by
data.upgrade26: Adds 4 orbital mini-projectiles rotating around the main one.
data.upgrade27: Projectiles fly in a wavy trajectory, increases damage by 75%.
data.upgrade28: When destroyed, projectiles split into 4 mini-projectiles horizontally and vertically.
data.upgrade29: Projectiles leave a trail of liquid behind them.
data.upgrade30: Adds a quickly regenerating shield over base health.
data.upgrade31: Instead of being destroyed, projectiles split in half in opposite directions once.
data.upgrade32: Projectiles unleash electrical discharges on nearby targets.
data.upgrade34: Grants 1 extra life. The character respawns with 30% of maximum health.
data.upgrade36: Doubles the range and adds 2 orbital mini-projectiles rotating around the main one. Projectiles move in a circular trajectory and pass through obstacles.
data.upgrade37: Projectiles change their angle by 45 degrees in a random direction every 0.5 seconds.
data.upgrade39: Increases laser drill mining speed by
data.upgrade41: Hitting creatures restores health equal to 50% of damage dealt.
data.upgrade42: Consumables - batteries gives 8 shield units instead of 5. Creates 1 battery.
data.upgrade43: Increases the rate of fire of turret buildings by 2 times.
data.upgrade44: Increases damage of turret buildings by 2 times.
data.upgrade46: Reduces the chance of creature swarms by
data.upgrade47: Increases the rate of fire and damage of turret buildings by 75%. Turret control becomes completely manual. You can only control turrets within line of sight.
data.upgrade48: Chance to block damage from any source. Chance depends on luck.
data.upgrade49: Increases damage from electrical discharges by 3 times.
data.upgrade50: Chance to leave a small swarm of bees at the location of a destroyed creature. Chance depends on luck.
data.upgrade51: Chance to shoot in 4 directions. Chance depends on luck.
data.upgrade53: Grants complete immunity to the burning effect.
data.upgrade54: Grants complete immunity to the poison effect.
data.upgrade55: Grants complete immunity to the freeze effect.
data.upgrade56: Grants complete immunity to the stun effect.
data.upgrade57: Grants complete immunity to the blinding effect.
data.upgrade58: Chance to fire a sticky projectile. Sticks to a creature and bursts into several small homing sticky projectiles if it dies. Chance depends on luck.
data.upgrade59: Projectiles absorb creature projectiles and instantly fire mini-projectiles in response.
data.upgrade60: Chance to fire a projectile equipped with a turret. The turret shoots towards the cursor, completely copying the player's attack. Chance depends on luck.
data.upgrade61: Projectiles home in on the cursor direction.
data.upgrade62: Chance of a secondary weakened explosion at the site of any explosion created by the character or weapon. Chance depends on luck.
data.upgrade63: The character leaves a trail of liquid when moving.
data.upgrade64: Chance to fire a slow projectile amplified 3 times. Chance depends on luck.
data.upgrade65: Increases: fire rate by 30%, damage by 20%. While holding the fire button, fired projectiles will stand still, but no longer than 5 seconds.
data.upgrade66: Projectiles gradually accumulate if you don't shoot. When firing, the weapon releases many projectiles and reduces the accumulated charge.
data.upgrade67: Chance to create a holographic copy of the character at the destroyed projectile's location. The hologram distracts nearby creatures and deals contact damage. Chance depends on luck.
data.upgrade68: Adds 4 additional projectiles. Reduces: damage by 25%, fire rate by 2 times, range by 60%. Increases spread by 40 degrees.
data.upgrade69: Increases fire rate by 4 times, reduces damage by 70%. Allows firing beyond the weapon overheat limit, but exceeding it will cause the character to burn.
data.upgrade70: Increases: damage by 4 times, projectile speed by 2.5 times. Reduces fire rate by 70%. Significantly increases recoil impact on the character.
data.upgrade71: Grants 3 additional rerolls, increases luck by 1.
data.upgrade72: Dash creates explosions behind the character.
data.upgrade73: Increases character's walk and run speed by 30%, reduces maximum health by 20%.
data.upgrade74: Increases damage by 75%, reduces maximum health by 25%.
data.upgrade75: Increases maximum health by 50%, reduces character's walk and run speed by 20%.
data.upgrade77: Converts all cartridge effects to positive. Creates 1 random cartridge.
data.upgrade78: Projectiles create explosions on contact with obstacles and pass through them.
data.upgrade79: Increases luck by 1. Subsequently, each selected item will further increase luck by 0.5.
data.upgrade80: Increases: fire rate by 3 times, damage by 25%. Mirrors the attack direction and significantly increases recoil impact on the character.
data.upgrade81: When taking damage, the character fires mini-projectiles in 12 directions.
data.upgrade82: Adds 1 additional projectile. Increases: range by 50%, spread by 20 degrees.
data.upgrade83: Increases: range by 2 times, projectile speed by 75%. Hitting a creature triggers an additional shot of a homing mini-projectile.
data.upgrade85: Increases the chance to find a cartridge when mining resources, gives a chance to get more resources per gather.
data.upgrade86: Chance to leave a taser at the location of a destroyed creature. The taser unleashes electrical discharges on nearby targets. Chance depends on luck.
data.upgrade87: Gives a chance to get more chitoplasm from destroyed creatures.
data.upgrade88: Increases character's walk and run speed by 10%, reduces the weight impact of two-handed items by 50%.
data.upgrade89: Reduces the cost of restoring buildings and interacting with interactive objects by 2 times. At the start of each subsequent expedition grants 10 scrap.
data.upgrade90: Increases damage by 4.5 times, completely removes weapon overheat. When a creature is destroyed, creates a hostile ghost in its place.
data.upgrade91: Chance to fire 1 - 5 additional projectiles in random directions. Chance depends on luck.
data.upgrade92: Increases luck by 10. Each instance of taking damage reduces this bonus by 0.5, but no more than once every 2 seconds.
data.upgrade93: Dash creates a holographic copy of the character, distracting nearby creatures. The copy disappears quickly.
data.upgrade94: Dash creates a piercing attack, damaging all creatures hit.
data.upgrade95: Strengthens friendly bees by 2 times. Reduces damage dealt by hostile bees by 30%. Allows the hermit bee to ignore the character.
data.upgrade96: Increases damage by 75%, reduces projectile speed by 2 times.
data.upgrade97: Extends the weapon overheat limit by 5 seconds. Creatures freeze on contact with the character.
data.upgrade98: Doubles range, reduces projectile speed by 30%, projectiles home in.
data.upgrade99: Any explosion created by the character or weapon additionally splits into 3 - 6 fragments in random directions.
data.upgrade100: Creatures catch fire and are blinded on contact with the character.
data.upgrade101: The character unleashes electrical discharges on nearby targets.
data.upgrade102: Increases: damage by 3 times, range by 3.5 times. Reduces: projectile speed by 40%, fire rate by 5 times. Projectiles home in on the cursor direction, pass through obstacles and creatures.
data.upgrade103: Adds 4 additional projectiles. Increases: range by 2 times, spread by 40 degrees. Reduces: damage by 70%, projectile speed by 30%, fire rate by 2 times. Projectiles home in and pass through creatures.
data.upgrade104: Increases: range by 50%, damage by 75%. Projectiles gradually slow down, bounce off obstacles and each other.
data.upgrade105: When destroyed, projectiles split into 2 - 5 mini-projectiles in random directions.
data.upgrade106: Reduces maximum health by 90%. Instead, grants a quickly regenerating shield, amounting to 50% of the character's previous maximum health.
data.upgrade107: Small chance to fire an antimatter projectile. The antimatter projectile instantly destroys any destructible target. Chance depends on luck. Reduces luck by 1.
data.upgrade108: Reduces fire rate by 30%. Projectiles gradually slow down. Random effects may apply to each projectile. When destroyed, projectiles split into 8 mini-projectiles.
data.upgrade109: Increases fire rate by 75%, reduces damage by 60%. Random effects may apply to each projectile.
data.upgrade110: Adds 3 orbital mini-projectiles rotating around the main one. Greatly increases their rotation speed. Projectiles pass through creatures.
data.upgrade111: A destroyed creature fires a weakened version of the character's attack towards another nearby creature.
data.upgrade112: A destroyed creature creates a powerful explosion behind it.
data.upgrade113: Completely removes weapon overheat. When firing, there is a chance the character will freeze themselves.
data.upgrade114: Chance to fire an acid capsule. A creature hit by the capsule will endlessly leak liquid until it dies. Chance depends on luck.
data.upgrade115: Reduces maximum health by 30%. Subsequently, each selected item will further increase maximum health by 15%.
data.upgrade116: Adds an additional chargeable laser attack with unlimited range. Charge accumulates while firing.
data.upgrade117: Allows opening all locked doors without using an automatic lockpick.
data.upgrade118: Reduces walking and running speed by 40%. Increases maximum health by 500 units. Prevents health from increasing and blocks regeneration.
data.upgrade119: Makes all liquids created by the character or weapon explosive.
data.upgrade120: Increases: luck by 2, character's walk and run speed by 10%.
data.upgrade121: Reduces luck by 3. Moderately increases all other stats.
data.upgrade122: Increases damage by 75%. The character speaks louder and may attract the attention of creatures.
data.upgrade123: The character shines a flashlight if no tool is selected. Creatures in the light area are blinded.
data.upgrade124: Infinite stamina. The character can no longer run, but the dash remains. Increases the character's dash force by 50%. Allows to dash with a two-handed item.
data.upgrade125: Chance to fire an egg. Instantly destroys a creature and creates a copy half its size in its place. Does not work on a creature that is already miniaturized. Chance depends on luck.
data.upgrade126: Grants 1 additional reroll, increases luck by 2.
data.upgrade127: Triples the size and hitbox of liquids.
data.upgrade128: Increases damage and fire rate by 0.5.
data.upgrade129: Small chance to leave beams in 8 directions with unlimited range at the site of any explosion created by the character or weapon. Chance depends on luck.
data.upgrade130: Enhances the effects of all elements inflicted on creatures.
data.upgrade131: Increases fire rate by 30%, projectiles pass through creatures and move in a wavy trajectory.
data.upgrade132: Doubles the amount of experience gained from missions. Reduces the number of item choices to one.
data.upgrade133: Gives the ability to leave the planet/moon before completing missions, once per run.
data.upgrade134: Increases damage by 2.5 times. A revolver constantly aims at the character, which may fire simultaneously with them with a 1/6 chance. The revolver's shot damage depends on the player's damage.
data.upgrade135: Increases fire rate by 75%. The character slows down smoothly and slides.
data.upgrade136: Each salvaged item choice gives 2 additional rerolls.
data.upgrade137: Grants the ability to continue rerolling after they are exhausted. Each reroll will cost the character 15 units of their maximum health.
data.upgrade138: Reduces damage by 30%. Projectiles pass through creatures and always have a freezing effect.
data.upgrade139: Increases laser drill mining speed by 5 times. Each mined stone explodes and creating a hostile ghost in its place.
data.upgrade140: Chance to leave a burning match at the location of a destroyed projectile. The match ignites creatures on contact and goes out after 5 seconds. Chance depends on luck.
data.upgrade141: Collecting organic matter additionally restores 15 health points. The organic collector works louder and may attract the attention of creatures.
data.upgrade142: Each mined stone grants 5 shield units, but not exceeding 25. The shield gradually decays.
data.upgrade143: Each destroyed creature grants 5 shield units, but not exceeding 25. The shield gradually decays.
data.upgrade144: Allows firing shots from the cursor's location instead of from the weapon.
data.upgrade145: Increases luck by 1. Prevents luck from being reduced.
data.upgrade146: When taking damage, the character creates a large puddle of liquid.
data.upgrade147: Grants 10 bonus rerolls. Bonus rerolls are not restored upon subsequent terminal activation. Bonus rerolls are only consumed after the primary ones.
data.upgrade148: If the character's health drops below 20 points, grants 25 shield units. The shield gradually decays. Triggers no more than once per minute.
data.upgrade149: Increases: maximum health by 15%, health regeneration rate by 50%.
data.upgrade150: Reduces damage by 2 times. Adds 2 additional projectiles. Projectiles are fired in horizontal rows. The distance between projectiles depends on spread.
data.upgrade152: Triples the size and hitbox of explosions.
data.upgrade153: Creatures under any elemental effect take 50% more damage from weapons.
data.upgrade154: Doubles the effects of cartridges. Creates 1 random cartridge.
data.upgrade155: Quintuples the size and hitbox of mini-projectiles.
data.upgrade156: Adds a ring of 5 stones rotating around the character. Stones block enemy projectiles and deal contact damage.
data.upgrade157: While firing, the character may stop moving and shooting. After a short time, the character starts shooting rapidly around themselves for 3 seconds.
data.upgrade158: Reduces maximum health by 30%. Projectiles pass through creatures and always have a poison effect. Enhances the poison effect inflicted on creatures.
data.upgrade159: Fills the experience bar at the beginning of each subsequent expedition.
data.upgrade160: Every 0.5 seconds, a puddle of liquid is created in a random location near the character.
data.upgrade162: While firing, the character periodically fires a laser. Random effects may apply to the laser.
data.upgrade163: Replaces projectiles with a rapid-fire melee attack that passes through obstacles and creatures. The attack always has an incendiary effect.
data.upgrade165: Increases the character's run speed by 60%. Does not affect walk speed. Reduces maximum stamina by 2 units.
data.upgrade166: Increases projectile speed by 50%. Chance to fire a piercing attack in parallel with the main one. Chance depends on luck.
data.upgrade167: The character accelerates smoothly. At maximum possible speed, the character becomes invulnerable and deals contact damage.
data.upgrade168: Increases fire rate by 75%. Fire rate varies slightly while shooting.
data.upgrade169: Projectiles constantly unleash electrical discharges in random directions and always have a stunning effect. When firing, there is a chance the character will stun themselves.
data.upgrade170: When taking damage, the character creates a small holographic copy that pursues creatures and distracts their attention.
data.upgrade171: At the start of each subsequent expedition, creates an old terminal next to the ship and grants 3 scrap.
data.upgrade172: Chance to fire a piercing incendiary projectile and ignite yourself. Triples the burning damage dealt to creatures. Chance depends on luck.
data.upgrade173: Increases fire rate by 75%. Replaces the character's weapon with dual pistols aimed in different directions. The pistols fire simultaneously.
data.upgrade174: Any type of crate when opened has a 20% chance to create a mini version of another random crate type.
data.upgrade175: Swarmers and pests do not damage the character and attack other creatures. The damage of swarmers and pests depends on the character's damage.
data.upgrade176: Adds a chance to find a random crate when mining stone, but no more than 5 per expedition.
data.upgrade178: Prevents walk and run speed from being reduced.
data.upgrade179: Prevents fire rate from being reduced.
data.upgrade180: Increases damage by 75%. Reduces: walk and run speed by 20%, projectile speed by 30%. Projectiles smoothly accelerate and explode.
data.upgrade181: Reduces projectile size by 2 times. Reduces damage by 30%. The projectile may explode at a random moment. After the explosion, the projectile increases in size by 4 times, and its damage is tripled.
data.upgrade182: A bonus lifeless asteroid, available for exploration, appears in the star system.
data.upgrade183: Guarantees the apperance of a random type of transport in each subsequent expedition.
data.upgrade185: Chance to double the reward reveived from the crate. Chance depends on luck.
data.upgrade186: After the current expedition, changes the biome of all lifeless asteroids to a random one.
data.upgrade187: Reduces range by 80%. Increases rate of fire by 3x. Projectiles split into 1-3 mini-projectiles in a random direction and always have a blinding effect.
data.upgrade188: Increases damage by 75%. Increases the chance of encountering elite creatures.
data.upgrade189: Dash creates a mine behind the character.
data.upgrade190: Projectiles always have a blinding effect. When shooting, there is a chance that the character will blind themselves.
data.upgrade191: When hitting an elite creature with a projectile, the next shot will copy its element.
data.upgrade192: Projectiles fired from the weapon are guaranteed to be antimatter. Each shot costs 20 health points. «It eats you away from the inside».
data.upgrade193: Vehicles colliding with creatures create explosions and do not lose speed.
data.upgrade194: Reduces maximum health by 40%. Increases the effectiveness of all healing by 2 times.
data.upgrade195: Small chance for a meteorite to fall at the site of any explosion created by the character or weapon. Chance depends on luck.
data.shipland: Start piloting the ship to continue
data.scrap_descr: here and now, Sebastian, you have to choose, family or...
data.rockout: Caution! Local stone deposits are running out!
data.metalout: Caution! Local metal deposits are running out!
data.siliconout: Caution! Local silicon deposits are running out!
data.mcr_av: upgrade available! press T to activate terminal
data.meteorcoming: A large celestial body detected in the upper atmosphere! Find shelter immediately!
data.missionsdidntdone: first complete all missions on this planet
data.missionsdone: all missions completed, return to the ship
data.microscheme_descr: instantly activates item selection upon creation
data.fruitdrone_descr: can carry 5 fruits or 1 two-handed cargo. When full, flies to the ship and unloads
data.frdrav: you already have a delivery drone
data.generator_descr: required to power some devices, operates at a short range
data.vdetect_descr: marks infected creatures at a short range, requires power
data.radar_descr: signals about the nearest lost satellite, requires power
data.watercollector_descr: extracts fuel barrels from sources, can only be placed on a source, requires power
data.organiccollector_descr: extracts organic matter from vegetation into capsules that decompose very quickly
data.organicav: you already have an organic collector
data.handscanner_descr: a small device, allows scanning flora and fauna, records fauna data in the bestiary
data.handscav: you already have a hand scanner
data.lockpicker_descr: allows opening doors, breaks completely upon a failed hacking attempt
data.lockpickav: you already have an automatic lockpick
data.turret_descr: a small helper turret, shoots at nearby creatures, requires power
data.barricade_descr: a wall of sticks and mud, can withstand a couple extra hits
data.hammer_descr: a small mallet capable of awakening the sand worm, only works in dunes
data.barrel_descr: explodes on detonation, can create a chain reaction, upgrades affect explosions
data.trap_descr: catches and locks a creature in a small crate. don't be a monster, they want to live too...
data.boombox_descr: plays various melodies and attracts the attention of local fauna
data.weedkiller_descr: a reactive mixture of beer and rotten tomatoes! wonder how they make it...
data.lightningrod_descr: two-handed tool, sparks and attracts lightning during storms on forest planets
data.teleporter_descr: portable two-handed teleporter, transports you to the next teleporter
data.cart_descr: allows storing and transporting two-handed items. onward, for shopping!
data.arthive_descr: a small portable bee house, creates friendly bees ready to stand up for you, their honor, and honey!
data.inhalant_descr: a can of stimulating gas, increases run speed. However, it also has a reverse effect...
data.bonfire_descr: a very ordinary bonfire. why do you need it if you have a spacesuit?
data.bestiaryscannew: creature record added to the bestiary
data.deadnotif: press SPACE to go to the menu
data.expnotif: object explored. press SPACE to continue
data.winnotif: star system explored. press SPACE to finish the run
data.shipdidntbroken: you performed a perfect landing and did not disturb the local fauna!
data.shipbroken1: ship slightly damaged, requires 1 scrap for repairs
data.shipbroken2: ship damaged, requires 2 scrap for repairs
data.shipbroken3: ship significantly damaged, requires 3 scrap for repairs
data.shipbroken4: ship critically damaged, requires 5 scrap for repairs
data.didntplace0: this device can only be placed near a generator!
data.didntplace1: the generator lacks the power to run this device!
data.didntplace2: this device can only be placed on a source!
data.hammerdune: hammer can only be used in dunes!
data.holde: hold E to enter the ship
data.holdesc: hold ESC for 5 seconds to self-destruct and finish the run
data.planetexplored1: this planet has already been explored
data.planetexplored2: this planet has already been explored
data.planetexplored3: this planet has already been explored
data.planetexplored4: this planet has already been explored
data.planetexplored6: I'm still not letting you in here
data.planetexplored11: you're going to break this button
data.planetexplored12: I warned you, you better stop!
data.planetexplored13: yes! go on, break it! we're millionaires - we'll buy a new one! >:(
data.moonexplored1: this moon has already been explored
data.moonexplored2: this moon has already been explored
data.moonexplored3: this moon has already been explored
data.moonexplored4: this moon has already been explored
data.moonexplored6: I'm still not letting you in here
data.moonexplored11: you're going to break this button
data.moonexplored12: I warned you, you better stop!
data.moonexplored13: yes! go on, break it! we're millionaires - we'll buy a new one! >:(
data.starlanding1: where do you think you're going?!
data.starlanding4: should we tell him you can't land on stars?
data.starlanding6: do you want to burn your ship?
data.starlanding10: it's useless to explain to you!
data.starlanding11: you still hope I'll let you through?
data.starlanding14: how many more times will you click this?
data.starlanding15: because of you, the button is already cracked!
data.starlanding16: the button is going to break!
data.Pest1: Microscopic organism the size of a large coin, living mainly inside weeds. Possesses high destructive power.
data.Pest2: Coin-sized creature hiding in weedy vegetation. Possesses disproportionately high destructive capability.
data.Pest3: Tiny pest inhabiting weeds. Despite its size, capable of large-scale destruction.
data.Pest4: Small parasite infesting thickets of weeds. Compensates for microscopic size with exceptional harmfulness.
data.Pest5: Almost invisible organism living among weeds. Its destructive potential is hundreds of times greater than its size.
data.Pest6: Miniature pest camouflaging in weedy grass. Possesses catastrophic destructive power for its size.
data.Pest7: Microscopic aggressor of weeds. Creates disproportionately large damage relative to its body.
data.Pest8: Tiny but deadly pest inhabiting weeds. Its destructive abilities do not match its modest size.
data.Pest9: Coin-sized weed parasite. Hides colossal destructive potential in a microscopic body.
data.Pest10: Invisible pest of weed thickets. Its size is deceptive - its destructive power is colossal.
data.Swarmer1: Miniature individuals (5-7 cm), exhibiting hypertrophied aggression immediately after hatching. No maturation period required.
data.Swarmer2: Colonies demonstrate extremely high aggression upon contact with any biologically foreign objects.
data.Swarmer3: Endoparasitic forms developing inside the queen's body. Activated upon rupture of the chitinous cocoon capsule.
data.Swarmer4: Short-lived individuals (lifespan ~72 hours) with modified chelicerae for neurotoxin injection.
data.Swarmer5: Blind castoral mutants, orienting via chemoreception. Attack any organism with a different pheromone profile.
data.Swarmer6: Short-lived (up to 48 hours) individuals with chitinous spines on limbs. Designed for high-density swarm attacks.
data.Swarmer7: Anaerobic variety capable of functioning in an oxygen-free environment. Secrete corrosive secretions when exoskeleton is damaged.
data.Swarmer8: Gregarious forms with 2nd-order collective intelligence. Coordinate attacks via ultrasonic pulses.
data.Swarmer9: Biodegradable individuals. After death, their tissues release allelopathic substances that suppress victim regeneration.
data.Swarmer10: Synchronized colonies acting as a single organism. Each individual serves as a biological 'tooth' in the overall system.
data.Friendly1: This species is characterized by a high degree of timidity, instantly fleeing to shelter at the slightest danger.
data.Friendly2: Possessing a shy nature, representatives of the species strive to avoid any potential threats.
data.Friendly3: Extremely cautious creatures, preferring secrecy and minimal interaction with the environment.
data.Friendly4: Exhibit innate wariness, hiding at any suspicious sound or movement.
data.Friendly5: Spend most of their lives in the shadows, avoiding encounters with other organisms.
data.Friendly6: Their instincts are geared towards avoiding conflict, making them practically invisible in their natural habitat.
data.Friendly7: Prefer solitude, rarely making contact even with their own species.
data.Friendly8: Possess a keen sense of danger, allowing them to hide from potential predators in advance.
data.Friendly9: Demonstrate an exclusively secretive lifestyle, relying on camouflage and quick reflexes.
data.Friendly10: Survival mechanisms are based on avoiding confrontation, making them elusive in their natural environment.
data.Neutral1: Exhibit moderate caution, but capable of fighting back if necessary.
data.Neutral2: Prefer to avoid open conflict, yet defend their territory when threatened.
data.Neutral3: Balance between peaceful behavior and readiness for self-defense.
data.Neutral4: Do not show aggression without apparent reason, but capable of active defense.
data.Neutral5: Distinguished by a balanced temperament, not engaging in conflicts unnecessarily.
data.Neutral6: Lead a cautious lifestyle, assessing the level of danger before deciding on a reaction.
data.Neutral7: Capable of adaptive behavior: retreating in some situations, showing aggression in others.
data.Neutral8: Remain peaceful in calm conditions, but may demonstrate aggression in stressful situations.
data.Neutral9: Not prone to attack, but can show significant resilience when threatened.
data.Neutral10: Their behavioral model ranges from neutral to defensive reactions depending on circumstances.
data.Agressive1: Distinguished by pronounced aggressiveness towards potential opponents.
data.Agressive2: Exhibit a high level of predatory behavior, attacking without prior warning.
data.Agressive3: Possess a warlike nature, constantly being in a state of readiness to attack.
data.Agressive4: Are active predators, viewing most creatures as potential prey.
data.Agressive5: Natural aggression is expressed in territorial behavior and frequent attacks on strangers.
data.Agressive6: Demonstrate a sharp reaction to the violation of their boundaries, immediately attacking intruding creatures.
data.Agressive7: Capable of showing aggression even without visible threat, attacking moving objects.
data.Agressive8: Live in conditions of constant competition, which makes them prone to attacks and territorial disputes.
data.Agressive9: Distinguished by extreme intolerance to the presence of strangers, showing immediate hostility.
data.Agressive10: Dominant position in the ecosystem is ensured by their aggressive and predatory lifestyle.
data.small1: Possess miniature size, making them comparable to small rodents.
data.small2: Their body length allows them to easily fit in the palm of a human hand.
data.small3: Small dimensions make them masters of camouflage among vegetation.
data.small4: Size facilitates effective evasion from predators and finding secluded places.
data.small5: So light that they exert minimal pressure on the surface they move on.
data.small6: Their tiny body gives them an advantage when moving through narrow spaces.
data.small7: Miniature size makes them almost invisible to most predators.
data.small8: Prefer a secretive lifestyle, using small size to slip away from threats.
data.small9: Their small dimensions allow them to easily navigate complex terrain.
data.small10: Body length and lightness make them ideal inhabitants of dense vegetation.
data.medium1: Size comparable to average weight terrestrial dogs.
data.medium2: Dimensions provide a balance between speed, strength, and endurance.
data.medium3: Body reaches about one meter in length, making them effective hunters.
data.medium4: Medium size allows them to successfully compete with both larger and smaller species.
data.medium5: Possess a physique combining power and maneuverability.
data.medium6: Are versatile creatures, adapted to a wide range of conditions.
data.medium7: Body size allows effective use of both attack and defense strategies.
data.medium8: Large enough to dominate smaller species, but inferior to larger predators.
data.medium9: Physical characteristics allow them to successfully hunt in complex natural conditions.
data.medium10: Optimal dimensions give them advantages in speed and survivability.
data.large1: Distinguished by massive build and significant weight.
data.large2: Large size allows them to dominate most neighboring species.
data.large3: Their powerful body requires extensive territory to find food.
data.large4: Slow, but possess formidable physical strength.
data.large5: Gigantic proportions make them practically invulnerable to most predators.
data.large6: Their massive musculature allows them to overcome significant obstacles.
data.large7: Adapted to life in conditions requiring high endurance.
data.large8: Huge size imposes limitations on movement speed.
data.large9: Massive limbs allow effective movement even over difficult terrain.
data.large10: Represent some of the largest creatures in their ecosystem.
data.clawed1: Feed primarily on the flesh of other organisms, being active predators.
data.clawed2: Possess specialized claws designed for gripping and tearing prey.
data.clawed3: Powerful claws can bite through even the tough protective coverings of victims.

data.warm4: Sustainably high temperature values are characteristic of this climatic regime.
data.warm5: The predominance of warm air currents creates a stably hot environment.
data.warm6: Climatic conditions with a pronounced predominance of warm temperatures.
data.warm7: Thermal indicators are constantly above average levels.
data.warm8: The warmed atmosphere maintains stably high temperature values.
data.warm9: A thermal regime with minimal daily and seasonal downward fluctuations.
data.duneworm_descr: Giant sand worms are annelids and play a very important role in the ecosystem. During cyclic vertical migration, they consume local fauna. In turn, the secretions they produce form stabilizing structures, comparable in hardness to sedimentary rocks, which prevents sand collapses. A feature of their reproductive process is reproduction by budding, in which each parent produces one successor, rarely two, and then dies instantly.
data.cellarworm_descr: The origin of drain worms remains a mystery. The most popular version suggests their descent from sand worms through processes of xenogenic adaptation, resulting from one of the failed terraforming experiments in the past. Some researchers believe that drain worms possess a mechanism of biological teleportation, which may explain their presence in abandoned drainage structures located on completely different planets.
data.manorghost_descr: Scientists report repeated cases of researchers encountering certain ghosts in anomalous wooden structures scattered across various worlds. These architectural artifacts, made from absolutely identical xeno-wood of unknown origin, are presumably a legacy of a vanished advanced civilization. There is a hypothesis that compounds emitted by the material induce collective visual hallucinations, calling into question the reality of these mysterious ghosts.
data.watcher_descr: There is debate about whether the Watcher is a living organism in the conventional sense. The crystal planets and moons they inhabit are vast neural networks. It is quite likely that the Watcher is nothing more than a part of the landscape itself, rather than a separate entity. In form, Watchers are very similar to the human eye. They appear in random places and scan the surroundings for foreign life. If a victim falls under their gaze, they will ruthlessly try to eliminate them immediately.
data.giantbee_descr: Unlike other bee species, hermits live not in swarms, but alone. By nature, they are quite aggressive - any undesirable movement can attract their attention and initiate an attack. There is an assumption that hermit bees are not a different species at all, but a special stage of development of ordinary bees, which is only possible on honey planets under certain conditions.
data.devourer_descr: Meat planets themselves and their origin are a real mystery to science, as are the Devourers inhabiting them. Outwardly, they look like a mouth with sharp teeth, composed of material very similar to ordinary iron, and can be of different sizes. To date, there is no scientific explanation for the nature of Devourers, however, they appear and disappear quite quickly. This may indicate that Devourers are merely a reaction of meat planets to external stimuli, akin to ordinary human scabies.
data.rockfall_descr: Large collapses of stone blocks are a very common occurrence on rocky planets. Erupting volcanoes throw huge amounts of giant stones into the sky. Upon landing, they destroy all living things, and sometimes bring useful minerals from the depths.
data.storm_descr: Storms periodically sweep over forest planets, and at first glance may resemble typical terrestrial thunderstorms. However, unknown atmospheric anomalies can affect the chemical composition of precipitation. Accompanied by lightning, these precipitations create reservoirs of random aggressive compounds on the surface, which can be deadly. Despite their short duration, such storms cause great harm to local wildlife and significantly reduce fauna populations.
data.blizzard_descr: Short-term storms, with their appearance, sharply change environmental conditions. Visibility drops almost to zero. Small ice crystals form in the air, which in turn create the effect of an instantaneous temperature drop to abnormally low values and limit mobility. When thermal balance is restored, the blizzard immediately stops.
data.balllightning_descr: A rare phenomenon that can appear at the site of a regular lightning strike. Ball lightning is very dangerous and unpredictable. Moving extremely chaotically, it can destroy everything in its path. Notably, the composition of ball lightning is completely identical to the composition of precipitation, which can give it even greater destructive power. Ball lightning usually disappears over time, but the duration of their existence can vary greatly.
data.meteorshower_descr: A rare and very dangerous astronomical phenomenon in which dozens of small cosmic bodies streak through the atmosphere and crash into the surface. This occurs when a planet passes through a dense stream of asteroids, whose fragments do not have time to completely burn up upon impact. Scientists believe that meteor showers are a consequence of ancient cosmic catastrophes, when large cosmic bodies, as a result of destruction, leave behind a trail of debris in orbit.
data.sporozoan_descr: A unique organism, a symbiosis of a large spotted mushroom and a photosynthetic liana. Its rubber-like, elastic thallus is capable of instantaneous and strong stretching, thanks to unique protein fibrils. After hunting, the sporozoan returns to the mycelial network, leaving behind a small amount of fungal spores.
data.plasmodium_descr: A shapeless meat body, devoid of signs of centralized nervous activity. Moves chaotically using spontaneous muscle contractions. A characteristic property of plasmodia is their ability to detonate upon detecting low-frequency vibrations. Many researchers who have seen this creature believe it is a biological weapon, but there is no scientific basis for this. Most likely, plasmodia are just part of the ecosystem of meat planets.
data.explorerghost_descr: I returned empty-handed and with a full load... of bad luck. They aren't answering, are they? Base, Earth - No one is answering. I'm trying to tell you this. Not to harm, but to tell. Look at me. I am your future. Our common future. The one who, without knowing it, brought the end of the world in his ship. Not poison, not a weapon... a quiet, little passenger. Invisible. And when you return - you will become me. One of all of us.
data.battlerover_descr: A small combat robot of unknown origin. Armed with a double-barreled laser weapon that resembles binoculars, which is also likely a kind of eye. Its operating system is easily reconfigurable, allowing the robot to be used as a temporary ally. However, before the hacking process, the robot must be neutralized.
data.ufo_descr: You, members of the human race, are obsessed with expanding your domain. Driven by greed and animal curiosity, you seek new worlds, but your minds are too fragile. The future of your small planet is at stake. Stop.
data.bigasteroid_descr: A large cosmic body that poses a deadly threat to all living things in its impact path. Large craters filled with burning fragments form at the impact site of giant meteorites. Despite their danger, the fragments are of great interest to the scientific community and are often delivered to Earth by researchers for further study.
data.sandstorm_descr: A very strong wind that occurs in the dunes. Dense suspension of solid particles greatly reduces visibility. Powerful gusts of wind create strong kinetic pressure, capable of displacing and carrying away both living organisms and equipment. Typically, this phenomenon is short-lived and ceases immediately when atmospheric pressure drops.
data.volcano_descr: A geological structure with a crater and an internal magma chamber. It randomly activates, ejecting hot rock chunks into the atmosphere. Falling debris forms small lava fields that maintain high temperatures and greatly impede ground movement.
